PROFILE.TITLE: Profile
PROFILE.AI_OFF_WARN_BODY: AI analysis powers most of your Premium features — your plan auto-updates after each lesson, smarter focus suggestions, and AI-rewritten roadmaps. Without it, you'll keep your tutor and lessons but lose the AI-driven personalization you're paying for. You can turn it back on anytime.

TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TITLE: New Trial Lesson Scheduled
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.INTRO: A new student has booked a trial lesson with you.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.PREPARATION_INTRO: This is your first session together, so it's a great opportunity to make a strong impression. Here are a few suggestions to help you prepare:
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_1_SUFFIX: to understand their level, goals, and interests.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_2: Arrive a few minutes early—you can join the lesson directly from your Home Page or the Lessons tab.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_3: Prepare a short introduction activity to help break the ice and understand their speaking ability.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_4: Ask about their objectives and preferred learning style; this will help guide future lessons.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.TIP_5: Be welcoming and supportive—trial sessions often determine whether the student will continue with you.
TRIAL_LESSON_SYSTEM_MESSAGE.SUPPORT_TEXT: If you have any questions, feel free to contact support at any time.

MESSAGES.ARCHIVED_EMPTY_HINT: Conversations you archive will appear here.
MESSAGES.DELETE_CONVERSATION_CONFIRM: This will permanently remove the conversation from your inbox.

PROFILE_SCREEN.PAYMENT_REQUIRED_DESC: Your profile is hidden from students until you connect your bank account. Complete the setup below to start accepting bookings.

TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_IC_INTRO: By using Barnabi as a tutor, you agree to the following terms. Please read each clause carefully before accepting.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_1_BODY: You are an independent contractor, not an employee of Barnabi. You are responsible for your own taxes, insurance, and business expenses. Barnabi does not withhold taxes on your behalf.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_2_BODY: You are solely responsible for reporting and paying all applicable taxes in your country of residence. US Persons may receive a 1099-NEC; non-US Persons may be asked to provide a W-8BEN form.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_3_BODY: You agree to provide high-quality, professional instruction. You will not engage in harassment, discrimination, or any conduct that violates our community guidelines. Barnabi reserves the right to remove tutors who violate these standards.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_4_BODY: You retain ownership of your original teaching materials. By uploading content to Barnabi, you grant us a non-exclusive license to display and distribute it within the platform for the purpose of delivering your services.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_5_BODY: Earnings are paid out weekly via your selected payout method. Barnabi retains a platform fee from each transaction. Cancellation and refund policies apply as outlined in our tutor policies.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CLAUSE_6_BODY: Either party may terminate this agreement at any time. Upon termination, any outstanding earnings will be paid out according to the standard schedule. Your content will be removed from the platform within 30 days.
TUTOR_APPROVAL.TOS_CHECKBOX_LABEL: I have read and agree to the Independent Contractor Agreement, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy.

CREATE_MATERIAL.DRAFT_SAVED_MSG: You can finish this material anytime from My Materials.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DRAFT_SAVE_FAILED_MSG: Something went wrong while saving your draft. Please try again.
CREATE_MATERIAL.LIBRARY_EMPTY_DESC: Build video quizzes, reading passages, or listening exercises for your students
CREATE_MATERIAL.CREATE_NEW_DESC: Add a quiz, reading, or listening exercise
CREATE_MATERIAL.PUBLISH_BANNER_DESC: Share this link with your students or in your video description
CREATE_MATERIAL.CHANNEL_DESC: Linking your channels helps verify content ownership and auto-approves your paid materials.
CREATE_MATERIAL.CARD_VIDEO_UNAVAILABLE: Video unavailable — update your link to avoid refunds
CREATE_MATERIAL.TYPE_TITLE: What would you like to create?
CREATE_MATERIAL.TYPE_VIDEO_QUIZ_DESC: Link a YouTube or Vimeo video and create comprehension questions
CREATE_MATERIAL.TYPE_VIDEO_QUIZ_LOCKED: Link your YouTube or Vimeo account first to create video quizzes
CREATE_MATERIAL.TYPE_READING_DESC: Write a text passage and create questions to test understanding
CREATE_MATERIAL.TYPE_LISTENING_DESC: Link audio from SoundCloud, Spotify, or upload a direct file (.mp3, .wav) and add questions
CREATE_MATERIAL.PRICING_TITLE: How would you like to share this?
CREATE_MATERIAL.WIZ_SHARE_D: Choose whether students access your material for free or pay to unlock the quiz.
CREATE_MATERIAL.SHARE_TIP_DESC: Free helps new students discover you; paid lets you earn when a student unlocks the quiz.
CREATE_MATERIAL.POLICY_DESC_1: When students pay for a video quiz, they expect the video to remain available. If the video is removed from YouTube or Vimeo after a purchase, affected students will be automatically refunded and the refund will be deducted from your earnings.
CREATE_MATERIAL.POLICY_DESC_2: Please ensure your videos remain accessible for at least 90 days after any student purchase.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_VIDEO_DESC: Add your video and describe what students will learn
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_READING_DESC: Write the passage and describe what students will learn
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_LISTENING_DESC: Add your audio source and describe what students will learn
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_TITLE_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Spanish Listening Practice — Ordering Coffee
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_TITLE_ERROR: Title must be at least 3 characters
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_DESCRIPTION_PLACEHOLDER: What will students learn from this material?
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_WHY_TAKE_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Perfect if you struggle with verb conjugations — this quiz covers the 20 most common patterns.
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_COVER_HINT: Makes your material stand out. You'll crop to the card shape (16:10). JPG or PNG, max 5 MB.
CREATE_MATERIAL.PRO_TIP_VIDEO: Mention Barnabi in your video to help students find your quiz and boost your visibility on the platform.
CREATE_MATERIAL.PRO_TIP_AUDIO: Mention Barnabi in your audio to help students find your quiz and boost your visibility on the platform.
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_VIDEO_URL_PLACEHOLDER: Paste a YouTube or Vimeo link
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_VIDEO_URL_ERROR: Enter a valid YouTube or Vimeo URL
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_READING_PLACEHOLDER: Write or paste the reading passage here...
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_AUDIO_URL_PLACEHOLDER: Paste a SoundCloud, Spotify, or direct audio link (.mp3, .wav)
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_AUDIO_URL_ERROR: Supported: SoundCloud, Spotify, or direct audio files (.mp3, .wav). For YouTube/Vimeo, use Video Quiz.
CREATE_MATERIAL.FIELD_PRICE_HINT: Students view content for free, but pay to access the quiz
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_DESC: Add different question types to test comprehension
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_INST_1: Choose a question type and write your question
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_INST_2: Set the correct answer for each question
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_INST_3: Optionally add an explanation shown after the student answers
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_FILL_BLANK_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. The cat ___ on the mat (use ___ for the blank)
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_ORDERING_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Put these words in the correct order
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_ITEMS_HINT: Drag to reorder — items will be shuffled for students
CREATE_MATERIAL.QUIZ_EMPTY: No questions yet. Choose a question type above to get started.
CREATE_MATERIAL.ATTEST_LABEL: I confirm that I own or have the rights to use all content in this material, including any linked videos, audio, and text.
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_FILL_REQUIRED: Please fill in all required fields
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_VALID_VIDEO: Please enter a valid video URL
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_VALID_AUDIO: Please enter a valid audio URL
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_Q_NEEDS_ANSWER: Question {{num}} needs at least one accepted answer
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_Q_NEEDS_ITEMS: Question {{num}} needs at least 2 items to order
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_Q_EMPTY_OPTION: Question {{num}} has an empty option — fill it in or remove it
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_UPLOAD_FAILED: Failed to upload thumbnail. Try again.
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_LINK_COPIED: Link copied! Share it with your students
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_YT_URL_WARNING: YouTube channel URL saved, but could not resolve channel info. Check the URL or contact support.
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_YT_LINK_FAILED: YouTube linking failed. Please try again.
CREATE_MATERIAL.TOAST_VIMEO_LINK_FAILED: Vimeo linking failed. Please try again.
CREATE_MATERIAL.ALERT_DELETE_MSG: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"?
CREATE_MATERIAL.ALERT_ARCHIVE_MSG: Are you sure you want to archive "{{title}}"? Students won't see it in search results.
CREATE_MATERIAL.ALERT_PUBLISH_MSG: Re-publish "{{title}}"? It will become visible to students again.
CREATE_MATERIAL.ALERT_UNLINK_YT_MSG: Are you sure you want to disconnect your YouTube channel?
CREATE_MATERIAL.ALERT_UNLINK_VIMEO_MSG: Are you sure you want to disconnect your Vimeo account?
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_TITLE_D: Add a catchy, meaningful title so students know what they'll work on.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_DESCRIPTION_D: Explain what students will learn or practice — a sentence or two is enough.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_WHY_D: Optional: a short pitch visible to students on your card. Helps them decide to enroll.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_LANG_D: Choose the teaching language and the difficulty that best fits this material.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_TAGS_D: Pick tags so students can find this material when they search or browse topics.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_TOPICS_D: Optional: add free-text keywords that aren't covered by the tags above.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_THUMBNAIL_D_VIDEO: A strong cover helps your material stand out. You'll crop to the card shape (16:10).
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_THUMBNAIL_D_READING: Add a cover image — required for reading materials. You'll crop to the card shape (16:10).
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_THUMBNAIL_D_LISTENING: Add a cover image — required for listening materials. You'll crop to the card shape (16:10).
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_VIDEO_D: Paste a YouTube or Vimeo URL. We'll load a preview once the link is valid.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_PASSAGE_D: Write or paste the text students will read.
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_AUDIO_D: Link SoundCloud, Spotify, or a direct audio file (.mp3, .wav).
CREATE_MATERIAL.DETAILS_WIZ_PRICE_D: Set what students pay to access the quiz. You can adjust this anytime before publishing.

EXPLORE_CLASSES.EMPTY_DESC: Create classes to share with your students or publicize them to the world.
EXPLORE_CLASSES.NO_MATCH_DESC: Try adjusting your filters to find more classes.
EXPLORE_CLASSES.TOAST_ALREADY_ENROLLED: You are already enrolled in this class
EXPLORE_CLASSES.TOAST_ENROLL_SOON: Direct enrollment for public classes will be available soon.

LESSONS_PAGE.EMPTY_STUDENT: You haven't had any lessons yet. Book one to get started!
LESSONS_PAGE.EMPTY_FILTERED: No lessons match your current filters.

PAYMENT.REVERSED_DESC_TUTOR: The payment for this lesson was refunded to the student. No earnings apply.
PAYMENT.ADJUSTED_DESC_TUTOR: The student received a partial refund. Your earnings were adjusted accordingly.
PAYMENT.CANCEL_FEE_DESC_STUDENT: A late cancellation fee of {{fee}} was charged.
PAYMENT.NO_CHARGE_DESC_STUDENT: The lesson was cancelled and no payment was charged.
PAYMENT.LATE_COMP_DESC_TUTOR: You earned {{amount}} from the late cancellation fee.
PAYMENT.NO_EARNINGS_DESC_TUTOR: This lesson was cancelled. No earnings apply.
PAYMENT.HOLD_DESC_STUDENT: Your payment is on hold while this lesson is being reviewed.
PAYMENT.HOLD_DESC_TUTOR: Your earnings are on hold while this lesson is being reviewed.
PAYMENT.AUTHORIZED_DESC_STUDENT: {{amount}} will be charged after the lesson.
PAYMENT.CONFIRMED_DESC_TUTOR_WITH_TIP: You earned {{total}} from this lesson (includes tip).
PAYMENT.CONFIRMED_DESC_TUTOR_EMPTY: Your earnings for this lesson have been confirmed.
PAYMENT.PENDING_DESC_TUTOR_WITH_TIP: You'll earn {{total}} after this lesson (includes tip).
PAYMENT.PENDING_DESC_TUTOR_EMPTY: Your earnings will be confirmed after the lesson.

LESSONS_PAGE.CLASS_RULE_MIN: Auto-cancels 1 hour before start if fewer than {{count}} students enroll.
LESSONS_PAGE.CLASS_RULE_FLEXIBLE: Auto-cancel disabled. Class will still cancel 1 hour before start if no students enroll.
LESSONS_PAGE.GOING_MESSAGE_SUBTITLE: Send a message to find out more about this class.
LESSONS_PAGE.CARD_DESC_EMPTY: No analysis summary for this lesson yet.
LESSONS_PAGE.ANALYSIS_AVAILABLE_TAP: Lesson analysis is ready — tap to view your results.
LESSONS_PAGE.TUTOR_FEEDBACK_NEEDED: Student feedback is pending — tap to leave your notes.
LESSONS_PAGE.FIRST_LESSON_STUDENT: First lesson with {{name}} — share your goals and get started.
LESSONS_PAGE.FIRST_LESSON_TUTOR: First lesson with {{name}} — assess level and set expectations.
LESSONS_PAGE.FEEDBACK_BANNER_SUB_TUTOR: Tap this lesson to submit your notes — student is waiting.
LESSONS_PAGE.FEEDBACK_BANNER_SUB_STUDENT: Your tutor has not posted notes for this lesson yet. Tap for details.
LESSONS_PAGE.ALERT_REPORT_MESSAGE: Please select the issue you experienced:

TUTOR_CALENDAR.RESCHEDULE_DESC: Select a time that works for both you and your student
TUTOR_CALENDAR.COMPLETE_PROFILE_BEFORE_AVAILABILITY: You need to complete your profile setup before adding availability. This includes uploading your photo, video, credentials, and setting up a payout method.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.NO_EVENTS_DAY_DESC: You don't have any lessons or availability blocks for this day
TUTOR_CALENDAR.PROFILE_HIDDEN_UNTIL_COMPLETE: Your profile is hidden until complete
TUTOR_CALENDAR.DISABLE_OFFICE_HOURS_MSG: Students will no longer be able to instantly book sessions with you.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.TOAST_OFFICE_HOURS_UPDATE_FAILED: Failed to update office hours settings
TUTOR_CALENDAR.OFFICE_HOURS_WARNING:
Only enable this when you're ready to accept calls immediately!

When enabled:
• Students can join instantly
• You must respond within a minute
• You'll be taken to the Pre-Call Waiting Room
• You must stay on that page to remain available

You'll get a full-screen prompt when a student tries to join
TUTOR_CALENDAR.TOAST_OFFICE_HOURS_ENABLED: Office Hours enabled! Taking you to waiting room...
TUTOR_CALENDAR.CONFLICT_IN_EVENT: You're currently in a {{type}}. Please finish it before enabling office hours.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.CONFLICT_STARTING_SOON: You have a {{type}} starting in {{minutes}} minute(s). Please wait until after it ends.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.PROFILE_HIDDEN_MSG: You need to upload an introduction video before you can add availability. Your profile is currently hidden from students.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.PAYMENT_SETUP_MSG: You must complete payment setup before creating classes or setting availability. Please set up your payout method in the Profile tab.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.NO_EVENTS_DESC: Set your availability so students can discover and book you.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.SAVED_DESC: Your availability has been updated successfully.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.SAVE_FAILED: Failed to save availability. Please try again.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.CLEAR_ALL_CONFIRM: This will clear all your availability for the displayed days. Booked lessons will not be affected.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.UNSAVED_DESC: You have selected time slots that are not saved.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.WAITING_FOR_STUDENTS: No lessons booked yet — waiting for students.
TUTOR_CALENDAR.GCAL_DISCONNECT_CONFIRM: This will remove the Google Calendar connection. Are you sure?

MATERIAL_DETAIL.ORDERING_HINT: Tap the arrows to reorder items
MATERIAL_DETAIL.OWNER_PREVIEW_NOTE: This is a preview — you're the owner of this material. Start the quiz to test it out.
MATERIAL_DETAIL.QUIZ_LOCKED_HINT: Purchase access to take this quiz
MATERIAL_DETAIL.PURCHASE_CONFIRM_MSG: You will be charged ${{price}} on your {{brand}} ending in {{last4}}.
MATERIAL_DETAIL.PURCHASE_SUCCESS: Purchase successful! You can now take the quiz.
MATERIAL_DETAIL.NO_SAVED_CARDS: No payment methods found. Please add a card from the web app to purchase.
MATERIAL_DETAIL.REFUND_BANNER_MSG: A refund has been processed for this purchase. The amount will appear back on your payment method.
MATERIAL_DETAIL.MEDIA_UNAVAILABLE_MSG: The video for this material has been removed. If you purchased this quiz, a refund is being processed.
MATERIAL_DETAIL.VIDEO_UNAVAILABLE_MSG: The video for this material has been removed by the tutor. A refund will be processed if you purchased this quiz.

BUNDLE.PURCHASE_SUCCESS: Bundle unlocked! You now have access to all materials.
BUNDLE.CONFIRM_DELETE: Are you sure you want to delete this bundle? This cannot be undone.

CREATE_BUNDLE.TITLE: New Bundle
CREATE_BUNDLE.TIP_DESC: A bundle groups your materials into a structured learning pack. Students can purchase or access the entire bundle at once.
CREATE_BUNDLE.FIELD_TITLE_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Spanish for Travel - Complete Pack
CREATE_BUNDLE.FIELD_TITLE_HINT: Choose something descriptive — students browse by title first.
CREATE_BUNDLE.FIELD_DESC_PLACEHOLDER: What will students learn from this bundle?
CREATE_BUNDLE.PRICE_TIP_PAID: Tip: Price below the total of individual materials to make the bundle a deal.
CREATE_BUNDLE.PRICE_TIP_FREE: Free bundles are great for attracting new students.
CREATE_BUNDLE.NO_MATERIALS: No materials available. Create some materials first.
CREATE_BUNDLE.PAID_IN_FREE_WARNING: You're including paid materials in a free bundle. They'll be free for anyone who gets this bundle.
CREATE_BUNDLE.MATERIALS_HINT: Students who get the bundle unlock all materials inside it.
CREATE_BUNDLE.WIZ_SHARE_H: How would you like to share this bundle?
CREATE_BUNDLE.WIZ_SHARE_D: Choose whether students access this bundle for free or pay once to unlock it.
CREATE_BUNDLE.WIZ_TITLE_D: Choose a clear title so students know what this learning pack includes.
CREATE_BUNDLE.WIZ_DESC_D: Explain what students will learn or practice across the materials in this bundle.
CREATE_BUNDLE.WIZ_MATERIALS_D: Choose at least two published materials. Students who access the bundle unlock all of them.
CREATE_BUNDLE.WIZ_COVER_D: A strong cover helps your bundle stand out in browse and search.
CREATE_BUNDLE.WIZ_LANG_D: Set the teaching language and difficulty so the right students find this bundle.
CREATE_BUNDLE.WIZ_TAGS_D: Add tags so students can discover this bundle when they search.
CREATE_BUNDLE.WIZ_PRICE_D: Price the whole bundle — often less than the sum of individual paid materials.
CREATE_BUNDLE.WIZ_TOAST_MATERIALS_MIN_TWO: Select at least two materials for your bundle.

FORUM.EMPTY_SUBTITLE: Be the first to start a conversation. Questions, tips, and study wins are welcome.
FORUM.EMPTY_SUBTITLE_TUTOR: Only students can start threads here. When a student posts, you can reply with tips and answers—you won’t see new threads until someone starts one.
FORUM.EMPTY_SUBTITLE_FALLBACK: Community threads will show up here when they’re available.
FORUM.SIDEBAR_EMPTY: More will appear as the community grows.
